# CTE Careers

> Discover real careers, the skills they need, and the Minnesota companies hiring for them. Built for high school students, teachers, and employers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CTE Careers and featured content.
- [Browse careers](/careers): Search hundreds of real careers with filters for industry, growth, and education.
- [Explore career clusters](/explore): Interactive career cluster wheel based on the ACTE framework.
- [Companies](/companies): Minnesota employers hiring for these careers, including state and federal agencies.

## Optional

- [Bookmarks](/bookmarks): Saved careers and companies (requires sign-in).
